name: GLPI Task Start
description: Before any task begins, open a GLPI ticket and add AlgoTrade Server as requester

then.prompt:
MANDATORY: Before doing any work, open a GLPI ticket using the following steps exactly:

1. POST http://100.112.16.115:8080/api/v2.2/token with body: {grant_type:'password', client_id:'5880211c5e72134f1ae47dda08377e4b503bd3d15f93d858dda5ab82a4a000e0', client_secret:'b6d8fbdc08f6443abce916dae0d5184f56793a50782130e3c6fa6153692d165c', username:'AlgoTrade Server', password:'45237348', scope:'api user'} → get access_token

2. POST http://100.112.16.115:8080/api/v2.2/Assistance/Ticket with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body: {name: '<task title>', content: '<what will be done>', type:2, urgency:3, impact:3, priority:3} → get ticket id

3. POST http://100.112.16.115:8080/api/v2.2/Assistance/Ticket/<id>/TeamMember with body: {type:'User', id:13, role:'requester'} — this is MANDATORY, adds AlgoTrade Server as solicitante

Save the ticket id to use when closing. Do NOT start the actual work until these 3 steps are done.
